title: Sales Operations & Approvals
summary: Operational motion: approvals, change orders, MAC, costing, disconnects, and partner programs. Use with your sales ops and finance partners.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: These documents define how orders move through approval, costing, and change control. Keep pricing and internal-only PDFs inside approved channels.
